files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives section. The GCI formula is duplicated in 03_Grid_Convergence.md - keep overview-level explanation here (what GCI is and target values), move detailed derivation to file 03. Missing Key Takeaways section.
files.01_Validation_Methodology.md: Heavy redundancy: GCI formulas and OpenFOAM code snippets duplicated from 00_Overview and 03_Grid_Convergence. This file should focus on the workflow/process (HOW to perform validation), not re-explain GCI. Add Learning Objectives. Consider merging MMS content into dedicated section or separate file. Missing Key Takeaways.
files.02_Benchmark_Problems.md: Good content focus (specific test cases). Missing Learning Objectives section. Missing Key Takeaways. Overview diagram duplicates 00_Overview - remove and reference instead. Consider adding 'How to select appropriate benchmark' section.
files.03_Grid_Convergence.md: This is the definitive file for GCI - good. Missing Learning Objectives. Add section on when to use 2-grid vs 3-grid method. Missing Key Takeaways. OpenFOAM function objects for QoI extraction should be here, not duplicated in overview.
files.04_Uncertainty_Quantification.md: Severely incomplete - more of an outline than a full document. GCI section duplicates 03_Grid_Convergence entirely. Sobol indices mentioned but not explained (formula given without context). Morris Method mentioned but not elaborated. Expand each section with proper explanations, examples, and OpenFOAM implementation. Add Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways.

global_strategy: Apply 3W Framework consistently: WHAT (concepts) in Overview, WHY (importance) in Methodology, HOW (implementation) in specialized files. Eliminate GCI duplication - keep detailed math only in 03_Grid_Convergence, other files reference it. Standardize structure: Learning Objectives → Main Content → Key Takeaways → Concept Check → Related Documents. File 04 needs major expansion - it's currently a skeleton. Consider merging 00_Overview content into 01 as introduction, since both cover similar verification/validation concepts at similar depth.
